original_title: Null DOM reference: Cannot set properties of null (setting 'textContent')
original_description: The profile page tries to update #user-avatar-container which does not exist in the DOM. The element is conditionally rendered and missing when the user has no avatar set.

console.message: [Profile] DOM reference error: Cannot set properties of null (setting 'textContent')
